title: NodeDisplacement
description: NodeDisplacement: Resulting displacements and rotations for a Node.

UX.description: Translational displacement in the X-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

UY.description: Translational displacement in the Y-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

UZ.description: Translational displacement in the Z-direction as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Length meassured in [m].

RX.description: Rotational displacement about the X-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Angle meassured in [rad].

RY.description: Rotational displacement about the Y-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Angle meassured in [rad].

RZ.description: Rotational displacement about the Z-axis as defined by orientation basis. Property has a quantity of type Angle meassured in [rad].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
